user_system_path: Add a Slack command surface for Foldera project command-center use
allowed_files_raw: Issue #314 slack bot route, slack logic lib, and Next.js config.
forbidden_files_raw: No UI changes, no Stripe/auth/schema modifications.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npx vitest run tests/config/__tests__/continuity-gate.test.ts --reporter=verbose && npm run build
acceptance_condition: Slack command bot responds with status, next, blockers, deploy, and receipt.
stop_condition: Stop only when #314 is merged and closed with GitHub receipts, or blocked with exact receipt.
anti_regression_checks: forbidden claim planted in public-facing copy fails
next_command: Finish #314 transaction through PR, CI, receipts, and merge or exact blocker.
